title: Blackjack Ketchum, Desperado
writer: Louis L'Amour, Luci Ward, Jack Natteford
actors: Howard Duff, Victor Jory, Margaret Field
plot: While doing a good deed, the title hero has to shoot a man in self defense, and go into hiding. His peace is interrupted when a cattle baron rides into his territory, and decides to settle there. When no locals want to sell, Jared...
